item.title: Managerial Expertise and Capital Investment Decisions (NAAS 2026) - Detailed Solo Narration
item.description: A 14-minute solo-narrator explanation of the NAAS 2026 study re-examining managerial learning, special items, and accounting reporting complexity in capital investment decisions.
item.itunes:summary: A 14-minute solo-narrator explanation of the NAAS 2026 study re-examining managerial learning, special items, and accounting reporting complexity in capital investment decisions.

item.title: Managerial Expertise and Capital Investment Decisions (NAAS 2026)
item.description: A detailed solo-narrator walkthrough of the NAAS 2026 paper on managerial learning, special items, and accounting reporting complexity.
item.itunes:summary: A detailed solo-narrator walkthrough of the NAAS 2026 paper on managerial learning, special items, and accounting reporting complexity.

item.title: CEO Pay Slice: Power, Capability, and Performance
item.description: A discussion of four research hypotheses on CEO Pay Slice — exploring whether pay concentration reflects CEO power, capability, or both, and under what conditions it helps or hurts firm performance.
item.itunes:summary: A discussion of four research hypotheses on CEO Pay Slice — exploring whether pay concentration reflects CEO power, capability, or both, and under what conditions it helps or hurts firm performance.
